description: Skill-level: routes /wicked-testing:review inputs to the correct reviewer per skills/review/SKILL.md dispatch table.

cases.prompt: Run /wicked-testing:review pointing at a run's evidence manifest at .wicked-testing/evidence/abc-123/manifest.json. The review skill should route to acceptance-test-reviewer — the dispatch target for an evidence manifest input.

Run /wicked-testing:review with both a spec file path and an implementation path, asking 'does the code match the spec'. The review skill should route to semantic-reviewer (post-code divergence review), NOT acceptance-test-reviewer.
